title: Incorrect column name in OR condition of LEFT JOIN crashes mserver
poc: CREATE TABLE bar (barid INTEGER, value CHAR(10));
CREATE TABLE foo (id INTEGER, bar1 INTEGER, bar2 INTEGER);
SELECT B.value, F.id FROM bar B LEFT JOIN foo F ON (F.bar1 = B.barid OR F.bar2 = B.id);
key_bug_features: Incorrect column name in LEFT JOIN condition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT CHECK(value >= 0));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT);
SELECT T1.name, T2.description FROM test_table1 T1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 T2 ON (T1.id = T2.ref_id OR T1.value = T2.ref_id);
